raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tā fakka tas KUNGS
Zebaoṭ: Reds/ Es falausifchu
Elana Stohpu/ winna stiprakn
Warra.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es weddiſchn vahr E-
lamn tohs tschetruś Wehjus/ no
teem tschetreem Debbes Stuh-
reem/ un iſkaifsifchu tohs ſchinnis
patcbôs Wehjôś/ un ne buhs ne
kahda Tauta/ kury Elana Aiſ-
dihtee ne nahks.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es iſbeedinäschn Ela-
mn winno Eenatdneeku Preek-
schâ/ un to Preekschâ/ kas win-
na Dwehſeli mekle/ un weddi-
schn pahr teem Laununu / to
Karſtumu mannas Duſinibas/
fakka tas KUNGS: Un es tuh-
tischu to Sohbinn teem pakkat/
teekauns es teem efmu Gallu
darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es zelschn mannu
Gohda-Krehſlu eekſch Elama/ un
iſnihzinaschn no turrenes to Keh-
nian un Leelus-Kungus / fakka
tas KUNGS:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 39,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet pehdigâś Deenâś
atgreeſifchnu es Elama Zeetumu/
fakka tas KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta L. Viodalla.
Gluddinaschana/ ka ir Babelei un to Kaldeêru
Semmei buhs iſpohſlitai tapt: 1. Un
teem Judu Zeetumekeem buhs atkat eekſch
jawas Semmes fafrahteem fhut: 4. xc.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Chis irr tas Wahrdś/
fo tas KUNGS irr
Orunnajs prett Babeſi/
wrett to Kaldeêru Semmi/ ſaur
Braweetn Jeremiju.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Staſtaſt warp teen
gaueim/ un leezeet to dsirdeht,
iſzelleet weenu Karrogu/ lee
to dsirdeht/ un ne apflepjeet
fakajt: Babele irr uhsjem
Bels irr Kaunâ tappis/ M
daks irr fatreektś/ winnu D
wekti irr apkannoti/ winnu
ka-Deewi irr fatreekti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo prett winnu nahk
na Tauta no Seemeſa-Puſ-
ta darrihs winnas Semmi
poſtn Weetu/ un ne buhs
weens/ kas eekſch tahs dshwo
tik labbi Zilwekt ka Lohpt irr
behgufchi/ un nohſtgahjuſchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tannis Deenâś/ un ta
Laikâ / fakka tas KUNG
nahks tee Israêla Behrni/
tee Behrni Juhda kobpâ /
staigahs raudadami / un
lehś to KUNGII fawu Dee
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tee waizahś pehz Zia
winnu Waigi greesiſees fe
pa to Zelfu. Nahzeet/ pee
stimees tain KUNGAM ar
nu muhſchigu Derribu/ ka-
taps aismirsta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Manni Laudis bij pa
duschas Awis/ winnu G
bij tahs preewihluſchi/ tee bij
Kalnôś wedduſchi/ tee gabj
Kalneem uhs Pakalneem/
mirfe.fawus Laidarus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiſti / kas tohs atr-
apehde tohs / un winnu P
neeki fazzija: Mehś ne bu
noſeedſigi/ tapehz ka tee pre
KUNGII irr grehkojſchi / &
tahs Taſtnibas Dshwofta
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
